zh.Little Hallingbury, Essex, England: 英國艾可蕾托 哈林波利
zh.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Courtenay於1212年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Robert de Courtenay29歲，母親Mary de Vernon30歲。她於1230年與John de Neville在英國戴文奧可哈普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1269年4月8日在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Courtenay于1212年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Robert de Courtenay29岁，母亲Mary de Vernon30岁。她于1230年与John de Neville在英国戴文奧可哈普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1269年4月8日在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Courtenay was born in 1212, in Okehampton, Devon, England, her father, Robert de Courtenay, was 29 and her mother, Mary de Vernon, was 30. She married John de Neville in 1230, in Okehampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 8 April 1269, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Courtenay est née en 1212, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Courtenay, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary de Vernon, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John de Neville en 1230, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1269, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Courtenay 1212 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Courtenay 29 und ihre Mutter Mary de Vernon 30. Sie hat 1230 in Okehampton, Devon, England John de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. April 1269 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Courtenay è nata il nel 1212 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, sua padre, Robert de Courtenay, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary de Vernon, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John de Neville nel 1230, nel Okehampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1269, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Courtenayが1212年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Courtenayは29歳，母Mary de Vernonは30歳であった。1230年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンでJohn de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1269年4月8日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Courtenay(이)가 1212년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Courtenay(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Vernon(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1230년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 John de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1269년 4월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Courtenay nasceu em 1212, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Courtenay, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Vernon, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Neville em 1230, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1269, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Courtenay родилась в 1212 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Courtenay было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Vernon, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Neville в 1230 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 апреля 1269 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Courtenay nació en 1212, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Courtenay, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary de Vernon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John de Neville en 1230, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1269, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
